category.description: The classification category for the email. Definitions: URGENT (deadlines, incidents, escalations, security alerts, CVEs, breach notifications, suspicious login attempts), ACTION_REQUIRED (asks you to do something/reply), INFORMATIONAL (FYI, newsletters, automated notifications that require no action), SUSPICIOUS (spam, phishing, urgency pressure), PURCHASE (orders, invoices), SHIPPING (tracking, delivery updates). Rules: Security alerts are always URGENT, even if automated. If in doubt between ACTION_REQUIRED and INFORMATIONAL, choose ACTION_REQUIRED.

needsReply.description: Whether the email needs a reply. True ONLY if a real person is directly asking the recipient something that should be answered by email. False for all automated notifications, platform alerts (JIRA, GitHub, CI/CD), banking, government portals, calendar invites, newsletters, and any sender with noreply/notifications in the address.
